notes.en: [[character:nicole]] is a potent Support that provides both a shield and a sizeable [[stat:atk]] buff to the entire team. The party member on field also gets an additional [[stat:atk|ATK]] buff after 3 seconds or instantly if they are a [[ability:hexerei]] character.
[[character:nicole]] needs 4000 [[stat:atk|Attack]] to reach her full [[stat:atk|Attack]] buff.

[[character:nicole]]'s [[ability:burst]] provides additional damage that counts as being dealt by the triggering character, not [[character:nicole]] herself. This damage matches the elemental type of the triggering character but does not apply the element at all.
Some teams do not gain a lot - if anything at all - from [[character:nicole]]'s [[ability:burst]], in which case building [[stat:er]] is not required.
